title: Landing page loads and key marketing sections are visible
description: Verifies the public landing page renders the hero content and users can reach features/testimonials sections by scrolling.

steps.description: Verify element "Feature highlights section" is visible

title: Pricing section is reachable and displays plan information
description: Verifies users can scroll to the pricing section and see available plans and pricing UI.

steps.description: Verify element "Plan call-to-action button" is visible

title: Toggle between monthly and yearly pricing updates the pricing view
description: Verifies the pricing toggle can switch between monthly and yearly modes and the UI reflects the selected option.

steps.description: Click on "Yearly" in the pricing toggle
Verify element "Yearly option selected" is visible
Click on "Monthly" in the pricing toggle
Verify element "Monthly option selected" is visible

title: Privacy Policy link navigates to the static Privacy Policy page
description: Verifies the footer Privacy Policy link routes to /PrivacyPolicy and static content is visible.

steps.description: Verify element "Privacy Policy content" is visible

title: Terms of Service link navigates to the static Terms of Service page
description: Verifies the footer Terms of Service link routes to /tos and static content is visible.

steps.description: Verify text "Terms of Service" is visible
Verify element "Terms of Service content" is visible

title: Successful sign-in returns user to /create and shows post type hub
description: Verifies that an existing user can sign in via Clerk and is redirected back to /create with protected content visible.

title: Invalid password shows Clerk authentication error
description: Verifies that Clerk displays an error when the user attempts to sign in with an incorrect password.

title: Authenticated user can access another protected route (/scheduled)
description: Verifies that after signing in, the user can access a different protected route and see its content.

title: Authenticated user can access /posted history page
description: Verifies that after signing in, the user can access the published history page without being prompted to sign in again.

title: Direct access to a deeper protected page (/create/text) is allowed after sign-in
description: Verifies that a user can sign in and then view the protected LinkedIn text post creation form.

title: Text post: Post Now to LinkedIn shows success toast
description: Verifies a user can create and immediately post a LinkedIn text post and sees a success confirmation.

steps.description: Type "E2E test post - text only" into the post description field

title: Text post: Enforce 3000 character limit in description
description: Verifies the text post description enforces the 3000 character limit and prevents overly long content.

steps.description: Type a post description longer than 3000 characters into the post description field

title: Text post: Cannot submit without selecting an account
description: Verifies the form blocks submission and shows validation when no connected account is selected.

steps.description: Type "Attempt without account selection" into the post description field
Verify text "at least one" is visible

title: Create hub: Post type cards route correctly to each creation page
description: Verifies the create hub cards navigate to the correct text, image, and video creation routes.

title: Connections page shows connected accounts and plan limit counters
description: Verifies the Connections page loads and displays per-platform connected accounts with a count vs plan limit indicator.

title: Instagram connection UI is not available (disabled or missing)
description: Verifies the Connections page does not allow initiating Instagram connection via UI due to the known disabled UI implementation.

title: View Scheduled page shows grouped batches with visible status and platform indicators
description: Verifies the Scheduled page loads and displays scheduled post batches grouped by date with visible status badges and platform icons.

steps.description: Verify element "a scheduled post batch card" is visible
Verify element "a status badge on a batch card" is visible
Verify element "platform icon(s) on a batch card" is visible

title: Reschedule a batch to a valid future date/time updates the scheduled date shown in list
description: Verifies a user can reschedule a batch to a future date/time (min tomorrow) and sees the updated date reflected on the Scheduled list.

steps.description: Verify element "a scheduled post batch card" is visible
Click on the first scheduled post batch card in the list
Click "Reschedule" in the batch actions menu
Pick a new date that is at least tomorrow in the reschedule date picker
Pick a new time in the reschedule time control
Click "Confirm" to save the new schedule

title: Cancel a scheduled batch changes its status to cancelled
description: Verifies cancelling a scheduled batch updates the batch status to a cancelled state in the UI.

steps.description: Verify element "a scheduled post batch card" is visible
Click on the first scheduled post batch card in the list
Click "Cancel" in the batch actions menu

title: Resume a cancelled batch changes its status back to scheduled
description: Verifies resuming a cancelled batch returns it to a scheduled state in the UI.

steps.description: Verify element "a batch card with a cancelled status badge" is visible
Click on the cancelled batch card
Click "Resume" in the batch actions menu

title: Delete a batch removes it from the Scheduled list after confirmation
description: Verifies deleting a batch via confirmation dialog removes that batch from the list.

steps.description: Verify element "a scheduled post batch card" is visible
Click on the first scheduled post batch card in the list
Click "Delete" in the batch actions menu
Click "Confirm" to permanently delete the batch
Verify text "No scheduled posts" is visible

title: Reschedule validation: selecting a past date shows a future-date error
description: Verifies rescheduling to a past date is blocked and a validation message is shown indicating the date must be in the future (min tomorrow).

steps.description: Verify element "a scheduled post batch card" is visible
Click on the first scheduled post batch card in the list
Click "Reschedule" in the batch actions menu
Pick a date in the past in the reschedule date picker
Click "Confirm" to attempt to save the new schedule
Verify text "Date must be in the future" is visible

title: Cancel action can be dismissed without changing batch status
description: Verifies the user can open the cancel confirmation dialog and dismiss it without changing the batch status.

steps.description: Verify element "a scheduled post batch card" is visible
Click on the first scheduled post batch card in the list
Click "Cancel" in the batch actions menu
Click "Cancel" to dismiss the confirmation dialog
Verify element "a scheduled status badge on the same batch card" is visible

title: Delete action can be dismissed without removing the batch
description: Verifies the user can open the delete confirmation dialog and dismiss it without deleting the batch from the list.

steps.description: Verify element "a scheduled post batch card" is visible
Click on the first scheduled post batch card in the list
Click "Delete" in the batch actions menu
Verify element "the batch card list" is visible
Verify element "the same batch card is still visible in the list" is visible

title: Open Posted Content History and view batch details
description: Verifies a user can access Posted Content History, open a batch, and see per-platform status details.

steps.description: Click on the first visible posted batch card

title: Verify posted batches are grouped by date on the Posted page
description: Verifies the Posted page shows content history grouped into date sections with batches underneath.

steps.description: Verify element "a date group heading above a list of batch cards" is visible
Verify element "a batch card under the first visible date group" is visible

title: Open a batch and verify per-platform entries are shown
description: Verifies that opening a batch shows per-platform post details and that multiple platform rows can be inspected.

steps.description: Click on a posted batch card that shows multiple platform avatars
Verify element "the batch details dialog" is visible

title: View post link is present within batch details
description: Verifies that a per-platform 'View post' link is visible inside batch details for posted items.

steps.description: Click on the first visible posted batch card
Verify element "the batch details dialog" is visible

title: Failed status batch shows failure details in batch dialog
description: Verifies that when a batch contains a Failed platform status, the error message/failure details are visible in the batch details dialog.

steps.description: Click on a posted batch card that shows a platform status of "Failed"
Verify element "the batch details dialog" is visible
Verify element "a failure details or error message section" is visible

title: Close batch details dialog and remain on Posted page
description: Verifies the batch details dialog can be closed and the user remains on /posted with the batch list visible.

steps.description: Click on the first visible posted batch card
Verify element "the batch details dialog" is visible
Click on the dialog close button (X) in the batch details dialog
Verify element "the batch details dialog" is not visible

title: Close batch details dialog using Escape key
description: Verifies the batch details dialog can be dismissed with the Escape key and the Posted page remains visible.

steps.description: Click on the first visible posted batch card
Verify element "the batch details dialog" is visible
Verify element "the batch details dialog" is not visible

title: In Progress status is displayed for partially processed batches (if present)
description: Verifies that any batch/platform entry with 'In Progress' shows that status in the batch details view.

steps.description: Click on a posted batch card that shows a platform status of "In Progress"
Verify element "the batch details dialog" is visible

title: View pricing section and toggle monthly/yearly prices
description: Verifies the landing page pricing section is reachable and the billing interval toggle updates visible plan pricing.

steps.description: Verify text "year" is visible in the pricing section

title: Payment success page shows confetti messaging and Continue navigates to /create
description: Verifies the post-checkout success page content is visible and the Continue action routes back to the create hub.

title: Access User Profile and view Clerk account settings UI
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open the User Profile page and see the Clerk UserProfile settings component.

title: Update profile name and save changes
description: Verifies the user can edit their profile name in the Clerk profile settings and save successfully.

steps.description: Fill "Updated Test Name" into the name field

title: Attempt to save profile with an invalid email format
description: Verifies the Clerk UI shows a validation message when an invalid email format is entered.

title: Open password section and verify password change form is present
description: Verifies the user can navigate to the password section and see the password change UI controls.

title: Change password with incorrect current password shows error
description: Verifies an error message is shown when the user enters an incorrect current password during password change.

steps.description: Fill "WrongCurrentPassword123!" into the current password field
Fill "NewPassword123!" into the new password field

title: Password change with mismatched confirmation (if confirmation field exists)
description: Verifies the Clerk UI blocks submission when new password and confirmation do not match (when a confirmation field is present).

steps.description: Fill "NewPassword123!" into the new password field
Fill "DifferentPassword123!" into the confirm password field

title: Password change blocked when new password is too weak
description: Verifies the Clerk UI shows password strength/requirement validation for a weak new password.

steps.description: Fill "123" into the new password field

title: Navigate across main sidebar links and confirm Studio shows Coming Soon
description: Verifies the persistent sidebar can navigate between Connections, Scheduled, Posted, and Studio, and that Studio displays the Coming Soon placeholder.

steps.description: Click Connections link to navigate to /connections
Click Scheduled link to navigate to /scheduled
Click Posted link to navigate to /posted

title: Open Studio from sidebar and verify Coming Soon placeholder is visible
description: Verifies Studio is reachable from the sidebar and the page indicates it is not yet implemented.

steps.description: Click Studio link to navigate to /studio

title: Use sidebar Create link to return to /create from another protected page
description: Verifies the Create link in the sidebar returns the user to the Create hub from another protected page.

steps.description: Click Create link to navigate to /create

title: Open user dropdown and navigate to Account (User Profile)
description: Verifies the user avatar dropdown opens and Account navigates to the user profile page.

steps.description: Click user avatar to open dropdown menu
Click Account in dropdown to navigate to /userProfile

title: User dropdown can be opened from multiple pages (consistency check)
description: Verifies the user avatar dropdown is accessible on different protected pages and shows expected actions.

steps.description: Click user avatar to open dropdown menu
Click user avatar to open dropdown menu

title: Sidebar remains visible after navigation to each protected destination
description: Verifies that the sidebar persists and remains visible after navigating to Connections, Scheduled, Posted, and back to Create.

steps.description: Click Connections link to navigate to /connections
Click Scheduled link to navigate to /scheduled
Click Create link to navigate to /create

title: Dark mode toggle works on landing page
description: Verifies the landing page has a dark mode toggle button and that clicking it switches the page to dark theme.

steps.description: Verify a dark mode toggle button (sun/moon icon) is visible on the page header
Click the dark mode toggle button
Verify the page switches to dark theme (html element has class 'dark' or background color changes to a dark color)
Click the dark mode toggle button again
Verify the page switches back to light theme

title: Rate limit error displays correctly when too many requests
description: Verifies the RateLimitError component renders with the 'Rate Limit Exceeded' alert, a countdown timer in MM:SS format, and a disabled 'Wait' button that becomes 'Try Again' when the timer reaches zero.

steps.description: Sign in with test credentials via Clerk (navigate to /posted which triggers sign-in, fill email and password, submit)
Rapidly reload or re-navigate to /posted many times in quick succession (at least 60+ times) to trigger the rate limit on the getContentHistory action
Verify text 'Rate Limit Exceeded' or 'Rate limit exceeded' is visible on the page
Verify a countdown timer is displayed showing time remaining in MM:SS or seconds format
Verify a 'Wait' or 'Try Again' button is visible

title: Subscription paywall blocks features for users without active plan
description: Verifies that accessing a subscription-gated page without an active plan shows the SubscriptionPrompt with 'No active subscription' message and a 'Subscribe now' CTA linking to pricing.

steps.description: Navigate to /create without being signed in (Clerk middleware will redirect to sign-in)
Verify Clerk sign-in form is shown (email input field is visible)
Sign in with test credentials that have an active subscription (fill email and password, submit)
Verify the /create page loads and does NOT show 'No active subscription' text — the post type hub with 'Text Post', 'Image Post', 'Video Post' cards is visible instead
Verify the connections page loads and does NOT show 'No active subscription' — platform names like 'TikTok', 'Pinterest', 'LinkedIn' are visible

title: Media upload rejects files over 8MB for images
description: Verifies that the image post creation form rejects image files exceeding the 8MB size limit and displays an appropriate error message.

steps.description: Sign in with test credentials via Clerk (navigate to /create/image which triggers sign-in, fill email and password, submit)
Verify the image post creation page loads at /create/image
Select at least one connected social account for posting
Upload an image file that exceeds 8MB in size (generate or use a large test file)
Verify an error message is displayed containing text about the image size exceeding the maximum limit (e.g. 'exceeds the maximum limit' or 'size exceeds')
Verify the form does not proceed to submission and the oversized image is rejected
